page: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family. Built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server features a dedicated x86_64 Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 48 physical cores and 96 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The hardware configuration includes a 410 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, supporting demanding block storage performance requirements.

Benchmark results indicate exceptional capabilities across compute, memory, and database operations. The server achieves top-tier performance in Geekbench multi-core (20551.0) and Passmark CPU scores (97410.84), supported by advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for AI acceleration. Memory bandwidth is a key strength, reaching top-tier read speeds of 7441.98 GB/sec for cached blocks and 429.08 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Database operations are highly efficient, with Passmark database operations scoring in the top tier and Redis SET operations reaching 118.21 million operations per second.

While the server lacks a dedicated GPU, its Intel AMX capabilities enable strong performance in CPU-based LLM inference, processing 249.96 tokens per second on medium 7B models. The absence of a GPU may limit its suitability for heavy deep learning training, but the high memory density and storage performance make it highly cost-efficient for enterprise databases, large-scale software compilation, in-memory caching, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated 96-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Featuring 768.0 GB of RAM (8.0 GB per core) and a 410 GB local disk, this server is designed for memory-intensive and high-throughput workloads. It delivers top-tier performance in multi-core benchmarks, memory bandwidth (up to 7441.98 GB/sec cached read), and database operations, including Redis SET throughput of 118.21 million operations per second. While it lacks a dedicated GPU, its advanced Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets support strong CPU-based AI inference and cryptographic operations. This configuration is highly suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, large-scale software compilation, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 96 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and a 410 GB local disk. It delivers top-tier database, memory bandwidth, and multi-core compute performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a 96-vCPU memory-optimized server with 768 GB RAM, delivering top-tier database and multi-core performance.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual machine delivering top-tier database throughput and multi-core compute performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 96 vCPUs and 768 GB RAM powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor at 4.0 GHz
Top-tier memory bandwidth reaching up to 7441.98 GB/sec for cached reads
Excellent database performance with 118.21 million Redis SET operations per second
Equipped with a 410 GB local disk and Premium Storage capability
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated CPU-based LLM inference
Optimized for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and heavy multi-core workloads
